data.title: 国际服Discord活动 纽约时代广场展示
data.summary: [Discord Event] Blue Archive will be featured proudly at Times Square NYC on November 1st! ⏰11/1(Tue
data.body:
[Discord Event]

Blue Archive will be featured proudly at Times Square NYC on November 1st!
⏰11/1(Tue) 5:00 AM ~ 11/2(Wed) 1:00 AM (EDT)

We've prepared two special events to celebrate it.
Please visit our Official Discord to participate!

https://discord.com/channels/890474004094263357/941585713416253460/1035528629079248986
